scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "cd server && PORT=3213 npm run dev" "cd client && VITE_PORT=5183 VITE_API_PORT=3213 npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
